name: prisma-multiple-schemas
description: Prisma ORM with Multiple Schemas - No Microservices

scripts.prisma:migrate:create: npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/users/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/subscriptions/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/music/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/likes/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/matches/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/chat/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate: npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/users/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/subscriptions/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/music/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/likes/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/matches/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=./prisma/chat/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/users/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/subscriptions/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/music/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/likes/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/matches/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/chat/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:reset: npx prisma migrate reset --schema=./prisma/users/schema.prisma --force && npx prisma migrate reset --schema=./prisma/subscriptions/schema.prisma --force && npx prisma migrate reset --schema=./prisma/music/schema.prisma --force && npx prisma migrate reset --schema=./prisma/likes/schema.prisma --force && npx prisma migrate reset --schema=./prisma/matches/schema.prisma --force && npx prisma migrate reset --schema=./prisma/chat/schema.prisma --force
